title: ExceptionWaiver
description: A time-bounded, formally accepted deviation from a Control. Carries a documented reason, a named risk-acceptance role, a non-empty set of compensating controls, an expiry date, a status and an optional review cadence. Open exceptions feed the POA&M. Top-level shape may be a single record or an array of records.

reason.description: Plain-language explanation of why the control cannot be met as designed.

risk_acceptance_owner.description: Role that formally accepted the residual risk. Use 'custom' only when the org's RACI cannot be expressed by the canonical roles.

risk_acceptance_owner_custom.description: Required when risk_acceptance_owner = custom. MUST name a role, not a person.

compensating_controls.description: Non-empty list of Control IDs that reduce residual risk while the exception is open.

approved_until.description: ISO 8601 calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD) after which the exception expires automatically.

review_cadence.description: Optional cadence at which the exception MUST be re-reviewed before expiry.

linked_risk_scenarios.description: Risk scenarios that gain residual exposure while this exception is open.

linked_obligations.description: Obligations that remain partially unmet for the duration of the exception.
